title: Neviti Dazzling Christmas Merry Christmas Script Bunting - Gold Foil
features: A simple way to add some sparkle to your festive décor
Part of our Dazzling Christmas range
description: Product Description Add a glamorous touch to your festive décor with this gold merry Christmas bunting, a simple but effective way to capture the excitement of the Christmas party season. Featuring gold lettering, this bunting adds some sparkle to various areas of your home - mirrors, walls, mantle pieces and more. Featuring an on-trend handwriting style font, this bunting is the perfect accessory for your festive celebrations. Safety Warning Pack contents include a long cord. To avoid strangulation and entanglement keep cord out of the reach of children. This item is for decoration only. Box Contains 1 x Merry Christmas felt bunting See more
